title: centaurea ragusina subsp. lungensis
intro: Centaurea ragusina subsp. lungensis, also known as Lung Centaury or Lung Centaurea, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been found to have health benefits including reducing coughs, relieving bronchitis symptoms, and supporting immune function. Additionally, the plant's antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties have been used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine.
